falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 2022 May Luna bottom's previous peak by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant breakout would invalidate the pattern similarity to a bottom and confirm a blowoff top scenario instead of a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average on two separate days within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate forced buying/selling, contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting a blowoff or crash is imminent.

falsification_conditions.condition: A major exchange delists the asset, causing a 25% single-day price drop
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A delisting event would introduce a clear external catalyst, disproving the UNKNOWN verdict by creating a definitive bearish trigger.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
